descriptionShort: Moncton Hawks defeat Baltimore Skipjacks 6-4 in American Hockey League play with converted defensemen Matt Hervey and Jamie Husgen contributing to third-period rally.
descriptionLong: The Moncton Hawks moved into third place in the AHL's Northern Division by defeating the Baltimore Skipjacks 6-4 on October 28, 1987. Coach Rick Bowness converted defensemen Matt Hervey and Jamie Husgen to right wing positions, and their aggressive play sparked a five-goal third-period comeback. Hervey scored twice and Jamie Gilhen added two goals in the comeback effort before 1,799 fans at the Baltimore Arena.

attribution.headline: Moncton Hawks Rally Past Baltimore Skipjacks 6-4
